events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Scenario: VFDs & motor controls observed during operation after reported concern checked. Readings steady, no abnormal sound or heat, maintenance log shows standard functional check completed with no open punch note. Reference NEC 430, mfr manuals. Need diagnose most likely fault from evidence. But evidence suggests no fault found. Decision likely pass? Need evaluate field condition. Since no abnormal findings, component conditions none. Work stage in-service. Risk low. percent_complete 100? In-service asset. value 0. confidence high. findings empty. actions maybe continue normal monitoring. rationale: no abnormal readings/sounds/heat and maintenance log clear; no fault detected. references NEC 430 (motor circuits), mfr manuals. Need ensure JSON valid.
